stories.title: Virginia Tech Is 46-10 and Can't Host a Regional — Hokies Head to Baton Rouge With a Score to Settle

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Virginia Tech went 46-10. Won the ACC runner-up spot. And still can't host a regional.

The NCAA ruled VT ineligible to host, so the Hokies travel to Baton Rouge to face No. 16 LSU. Game 1 vs. South Alabama, Friday 4 PM ET.

Top upset pick in the bracket. 🥎 #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Virginia Tech beat Duke 5-0 in the ACC semis. Finished 46-10. NCAA says they can't host.

So they pack up and head to Baton Rouge. The Hokies are angry, and angry teams do damage in May. 🥎 #CollegeSoftball #Hokies

stories.title: Texas Enters Austin Regional as Defending Champion — Kavan's Title Defense Begins Friday

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Texas enters the 2026 NCAA Tournament as the defending national champion and No. 2 seed.

Teagan Kavan, last year's WCWS MVP, just threw a 12-K gem to win the SEC title. The Austin Regional starts Friday.

Title defense begins now. 🤘 #HookEm #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Back-to-back titles in softball is rare. Oklahoma won four straight from 2021-2024. Florida did it in 2013-14.

Now Texas is chasing their second in a row. Kavan returns. 42-10 record. First SEC title in program history.

The blueprint is there. #HookEm #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Teagan Kavan and Texas Are Going for Back-to-Back — The Title Defense Begins Friday in Austin

stories.title: Georgia Carries Upset Momentum Into Athens Regional as No. 10 Seed

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Georgia beat No. 1 Oklahoma 10-5 in the biggest comeback in SEC Tournament history. Now they're the No. 10 seed hosting the Athens Regional.

The Dawgs are hot heading into May 15. Clemson, UNCG, and Charleston in the field.

Upset alert is already on. 🐾 #GoDawgs #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Megan Grant Takes Her 38 HRs Into the L.A. Regional — UCLA's Final Run Starts Friday

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant: 38 home runs. NCAA single-season record, all-time.

Now she takes that bat into the L.A. Regional at Easton Stadium as No. 8 UCLA hosts Friday. South Carolina, Cal State Fullerton, Cal Baptist in the field.

Can she close her career with a title? 🥎 #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: Texas Tech Hosts Lubbock Regional Again — NiJaree Canady Leads Red Raiders Into May

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech hosts the Lubbock Regional for the second straight year. NiJaree Canady leads a 50+ win team with unfinished business after last year's national runner-up finish.

Ole Miss, Boston U, and Marist in the field. Friday at Tracy Sellers Field. 🤘 #WreckEm #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: WCWS Final Four Predictions — Who Wins the 2026 National Title?

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
64 teams. 3 days until regionals. One champion on June 3 in OKC.

Who wins the 2026 WCWS? No. 1 Alabama (49-7, 22 shutouts). No. 2 Texas (defending champ). No. 3 Oklahoma (.389 BA, 174 HRs). Dark horse: Georgia.

Drop your pick below. 🥎 #CollegeSoftball #WCWS
